description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Green wallet that has a flap style opening with a press buttoned closure Six card holders, one transparent id card holder, two compartments and one zipped separator in the main compartment Four card holders on the inner side of the flap A metallic ring design and branding on the front Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Size 19 cm x 10 cm
